creator: dbn@FreeBSD.org
text:
TL;DR: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D13869

Upstream changed RPM version for three packages:
 - pulseaudio-libs (to version 26)
 - libgfortrain (to version 18)
 - avahi-libs (to version 17)

Upstream changed package layout for EPEL and EPEL7:
 - packages are under the directories Packages/[0-9a-z]
 - EPEL7 already included the latter prefix ([0-9a-z]) in SUBDIR
